name: Umbrella Artificial Plant - Threshold™
description:
Bring nature-inspired elegance to your home with this Umbrella Artificial Plant from Threshold™. This faux umbrella plant is housed in a white pot made from stoneware. Filled with faux soil and styrofoam, it features a cluster of leaves and branches originating from a single stem to mimic the real plant. Designed for indoor use, you can place it on a tabletop, or shelf anywhere in your home.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
